message:
feat: add Amp XDG_DATA_HOME support, Roo-Cline probe paths, and refactor probe root helper

Three improvements to agent detection probe logic:

1. Amp agent now respects XDG_DATA_HOME environment variable: new
   amp_xdg_probe_root_from_env_value() and amp_xdg_probe_root_from_env()
   functions construct an amp subdirectory from the XDG path, prepending it
   before the existing hardcoded probe roots. Blank/whitespace values are
   rejected.

2. Cline detection now probes Roo-Cline extension paths alongside the
   original Cline paths: cline_storage_probe_roots_from_home() generates
   probe roots for both saoudrizwan.claude-dev and
   rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline across VS Code and Cursor on Linux, macOS,
   and Windows. default_probe_paths_tilde display function updated to loop
   over both extension IDs.

3. Refactor push closure in default_probe_roots to standalone inner function
   maybe_push(&mut Vec<PathBuf>, &[...]) for clarity. Pure refactor with
   no behavioral change.

New tests:
- amp_xdg_probe_root_uses_trimmed_env_value
- amp_xdg_probe_root_rejects_blank_env_value
- cline_storage_probe_roots_cover_vscode_and_cursor_layouts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
